events.summary: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

prep.summary: You are coordinating the cascade of engineering feedback from the recent HP sessions—specifically filtering the ten executive points down to actionable staff-level discussions—while managing the broader rollouts of Project IVA and the "vibe coding" governance guidelines. Ongoing friction persists around funding and ownership for Scan AI—especially the enterprise versus P&C division of capabilities—demanding a unified technical decision timeline. Prepare to synthesize these threads alongside your weekly off-site insights to brief the combined leadership team.
tasks: Review your sent emails folder—focusing on Monday and Thursday correspondence—to compile the final list of key takeaways from the recent HP meetings and leadership off-sites.
Finalize the distilled list of actionable engineering feedback items—reducing the original ten points—before Tech Fellows cascade them to their respective staff meetings.
Clarify the funding model for Scan AI—resolving the overlapping scopes with Celonis—to prevent a lengthy RFP process.
Establish the governance model for developer productivity tools—addressing the prompt repositories and accountability guardrails—ahead of the Project IVA employee pilot.
Confirm the presentation materials for the upcoming Board of Directors meeting—specifically targeting the IVA modernization timeline—to ensure executive alignment.
prep.title: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
9:00 AM — 10:00 AM

Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

https://usaa.zoom.us/j/9683...
Prep

You are coordinating the cascade of engineering feedback from the recent HP sessions—specifically filtering the ten executive points down to actionable staff-level discussions—while managing the broader rollouts of Project IVA and the "vibe coding" governance guidelines. Ongoing friction persists around funding and ownership for Scan AI—especially the enterprise versus P&C division of capabilities—demanding a unified technical decision timeline. Prepare to synthesize these threads alongside your weekly off-site insights to brief the combined leadership team.

  • Review your sent emails folder—focusing on Monday and Thursday correspondence—to compile the final list of key takeaways from the recent HP meetings and leadership off-sites.
  • Finalize the distilled list of actionable engineering feedback items—reducing the original ten points—before Tech Fellows cascade them to their respective staff meetings.
  • Clarify the funding model for Scan AI—resolving the overlapping scopes with Celonis—to prevent a lengthy RFP process.
  • Establish the governance model for developer productivity tools—addressing the prompt repositories and accountability guardrails—ahead of the Project IVA employee pilot.
  • Confirm the presentation materials for the upcoming Board of Directors meeting—specifically targeting the IVA modernization timeline—to ensure executive alignment.
